creator: feh@fehcom.de
text:
Hi, 

this is, what I get:

[erwin@amr5:~] $ pkg info drm*kmod
drm-515-kmod-5.15.118_3
drm-kmod-20220907_1

[erwin@amr5:~] $ uname -a
FreeBSD amr5 14.1-RELEASE FreeBSD 14.1-RELEASE releng/14.1-n267679-
10e31f0946d8 GENERIC amd64

I'll try to update to -CURRENT the next days and will report. 
Since I moved to the new HW, crash frequency is substanially reduced;
but is reproducible copying files with 'nemo'.

[erwin@amr5:~] $ ps -aux | grep nemo
erwin      2384    0,0  0,4  135680   61736  -  S    20:40      0:02,56
nemo-desktop
erwin      2433    0,0  0,5  137496   76352  -  S    20:40      0:04,88
/usr/local/bin/nemo /home/erwin
